use_codes.desc: TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY IN ADULT MALES FOR CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE; PRIMARY HYPOGONADISM (CONGENITAL OR ACQUIRED); HYPOGONADOTROPIC HYPOGONADISM (CONGENITAL OR ACQUIRED).

indications.text:
Aveed is indicated for testosterone replacement therapy in adult males for conditions associated with a deficiency or absence of
endogenous testosterone.
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired): testicular failure due to cryptorchidism, bilateral torsion, orchitis, vanishing
testis syndrome,...
